name: Turkey Sausage
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Chopped fresh thyme, -OR- 1 ts Dried thyme
1 1/2 lb Ground turkey (2 parts dark meat to 1 part white meat)
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: For this sausage, the turkey should be 2 parts dark meat to 1 part white meat. Ground turkey from the supermarket works well in this recipe.
1. Combine brandy, thyme, cloves, onion, pepper, and salt in a small saucepan and place over medium heat. Cook for 3 minutes.
2. Scrape into the bowl of a food processor.
3. Add the bacon and puree until smooth.
4. Place the mixture in a mixing bowl, add the ground turkey and egg whites, and mix well.
5. Stuff the mixture into casings or form into patties.
6. Grill or cook sausages and serve immediately.
